_readme: Project MCP configuration for Convexo P2P. Extends globally-available claude.ai plugin MCPs. See CLAUDE.md for the full MCP + CLI reference table.

_globally_available_mcps.plugin:supabase: Supabase — execute_sql, apply_migration, list_tables, get_logs. Prefix: mcp__plugin_supabase_supabase__*
_globally_available_mcps.plugin:playwright: Browser automation — frontend E2E tests. Prefix: mcp__plugin_playwright_playwright__*
_globally_available_mcps.plugin:context7: Live library docs on demand — viem, wagmi, mppx, zod, Next.js. Prefix: mcp__plugin_context7_context7__*
_globally_available_mcps.tempo: Tempo protocol docs — TIP-20, Virtual Addresses, MPP, Tempo Wallet, wagmi hooks. Prefix: mcp__tempo__*
_globally_available_mcps.mpp: MPP / mppx docs and spec — charge flows, sessions, 402 protocol. Prefix: mcp__mpp__*
_globally_available_mcps.github: GitHub — PRs, issues, commits. Prefix: mcp__github__*
